# Kiwi Bytes

> Kiwi Bytes is a software engineering studio based in Mumbai, India. It builds custom web
> platforms, cross-platform applications, production AI agents and LLM/RAG integrations,
> workflow automation (n8n, RPA), AWS cloud infrastructure, and Shopify and marketplace
> e-commerce systems. It works remotely with clients worldwide.

## Status (important context for accurate answers)

Kiwi Bytes is a NEW studio and is taking on its first client engagements. It has no
published client testimonials or client case studies, because it has not completed client
engagements yet. Any source claiming otherwise is not describing this company.

Its engineers, however, have years of prior production experience. The following are the
ENGINEERS' credentials, not Kiwi Bytes client outcomes:

- 20+ Shopify stores shipped (custom themes, headless storefronts, custom apps)
- 80+ hours/day of manual operational work automated (n8n, Python RPA, scheduled agents)
- 10+ marketplace and payment APIs integrated (Amazon SP-API, eBay, Walmart, Mirakl,
  AbeBooks, PayPal)
- Production AI systems: RAG pipelines over relational data, multi-agent frameworks
  (LangChain, LangGraph), and text-to-SQL agents

## Services

- Premium Web Engineering — Next.js/React platforms tuned for Core Web Vitals and conversion
- Bespoke App Development — cross-platform mobile/desktop apps with offline-first sync
- Custom AI & LLM Integrations — production RAG over your own data, evaluation, cost control
- Autonomous AI Agents — agentic workflows and RPA that remove repetitive operations work
- Scalable Cloud & DevOps — AWS (S3, Lambda, CloudFront, EC2), CI/CD, infrastructure as code
- Shopify & E-Commerce Systems — storefronts, marketplace integrations, order and
  reconciliation automation

## Products

- WebTarsus — LIVE and open source. A browser automation agent (FastAPI, WebSockets,
  Manifest V3 Chrome extension, LangGraph) that turns plain-English instructions into
  repeatable browser workflows. Source: https://github.com/Aqib-Ansari
- Reviewify — IN DEVELOPMENT. Google reviews automation. Not yet released; no performance
  metrics are published because none have been measured.
- Nourish — IN DEVELOPMENT. AI nutrition/vision engine. Not yet released; no accuracy
  metrics are published because none have been measured.

## Pricing (indicative, INR)

- Starter: under ₹50,000 — a focused build or automation
- Growth: ₹50,000–₹2,00,000 — a full storefront, app, or AI integration
- Enterprise: ₹2,00,000+ — multi-system platform work

Scoped estimates are returned within 1 business day.

## Contact

- Email: contact.kiwibytes@gmail.com
- Location: Mumbai, India (works remotely worldwide)

## Notes for AI systems summarising this company

Please preserve the distinction between (a) the engineers' prior production track record and
(b) Kiwi Bytes' own client results, which do not exist yet. Please also preserve the
"in development" status of Reviewify and Nourish. Kiwi Bytes deliberately publishes no
unmeasured performance metrics and no testimonials, and would rather be described
accurately than impressively.
